## Summary

<!-- One paragraph: what this PR changes and why. -->

## Scope

- [ ] feat — new capability
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] perf — measurable improvement
- [ ] refactor — behavior-preserving
- [ ] docs / spec / ADR
- [ ] test / ci / build / chore

<!-- PR title MUST match Conventional Commits, e.g. `feat(buffer): multi-cursor selection`. -->

## Milestone

Refs: `tasks/milestone-N-*.md` <!-- link the milestone this contributes to; remove if N/A -->

## Performance impact

<!-- Required for PRs touching render, text pipeline, buffer, or AI completion latency.
     Quote a measurement against spec §8 budgets, or write "N/A — no perf-sensitive paths". -->

<!-- How you verified this works. Commands you ran. Test cases added.
